message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice, and this conversation is being logged. I’m sorry to hear that. I will note that you are unable to pay this month. To continue, please confirm your full name for verification regarding the account ending in 1184.
Neha Verma. I’m currently unemployed, so I can’t make any payment right now.

Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship and are unable to make a payment right now due to unemployment. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I’ve already explained my situation. I don’t have any payment to give right now.

Understood. I’ve noted that you’re unemployed and unable to make a payment right now. For this account, there isn’t an extension available beyond 21 days. If your situation changes, the available next step would be to discuss a payment arrangement within approved policy limits. If you want, I can note that you’re not able to proceed now and limit follow-up to when a compliant option can be discussed.
Note that if you want, but I’m still not in a position to commit to any payment.

Understood. I’ve noted that you’re not able to commit to any payment right now. For this account, there isn’t an extension available beyond 21 days, and I don’t have a concrete hardship arrangement to offer in chat from the current policy. I’ll record your position and limit this to follow-up only if a compliant option can be discussed.
